issue.message: READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE is deprecated (and is not granted) when targeting Android 13+. If you need to query or interact with MediaStore or media files on the shared storage, you should instead use one or more new storage permissions: `READ_MEDIA_IMAGES`, `READ_MEDIA_VIDEO` or `READ_MEDIA_AUDIO`.
The result of `assertThat` is not used
Value must be ≥ 0 but `getColumnIndex` can be -1

The indentation string here is different from on the previous line (`" "` vs `\t`)
Must be one or more of: Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION, Intent.FLAG_GRANT_WRITE_URI_PERMISSION
Must be one or more of: InputMethodManager.HIDE_IMPLICIT_ONLY, InputMethodManager.HIDE_NOT_ALWAYS
Avoid passing `null` as the view root (needed to resolve layout parameters on the inflated layout's root element)

The resource `@string/copy` is marked as private in androidx.preference:preference:1.2.0
Overriding `@string/copy` which is marked as private in androidx.preference:preference:1.2.0. If deliberate, use tools:override="true", otherwise pick a different name.

Hardcoded string "0/0", should use `@string` resource
When you define `paddingLeft` you should probably also define `paddingRight` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingEnd` you should probably also define `paddingStart` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingLeft` you should probably also define `paddingRight` for right-to-left symmetry
